name: Khadpanch
overview: After the success of "Yaar Jigree Kasooti Degree" and "Yaar Chale Bahar" Troll Punjabi is back with a Mystery Series "KHADPANCH" - A gripping tale of a Punjab's Village torn apart by addiction secrets, and the relentless pursuit of justice.

trailers.title: KHADPANCH (Official Trailer) | Releasing 10 January (All Episodes) | Punjabi Web Series 2025
